titleStmt.title: SII 16.140: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 140. (A.R. No. 362 of 1920.) KAṆḌLAGŪḌŪRU, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhin, Māgha śu. 15, corresponding to 1545 A.D., January 27 (Tuesday).

This damaged record seems to register a gift of land and income derived from the bōyi-suṅkam by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Annemarāju Vīraya Bōyiḍu. The gift land lay in Pūsalapāḍu which was included in Jagatāpigutti-sīma and which was given to the dones as māgāṇi by Rāmarāja Yaṟatimmarājaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1466 Agunēṭi krōdhi saṁvatsara māgha
śuda 15 lu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadāsi
vadēvamahārāyalu pṛthivirājyaṁ sēyucu
ṁḍaṁgānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Annemarā
ju vīrayabōyiḍu gājulukoṁḍa buḍaṁki siṁ
gayyareḍi reḍḍi ka yaniki yiccina dha
ṁrma bōyisuṁkapu śāsanaṁ kramaṁ Eṭlaṁnnanu
rāmarāja yaratiṁmarājayagāru jagatāpigu
ttisīmalōnu māku māgāṇiki pāliṁci yiccina pū
salapāṭiki celle
nuṁnu nīku sarvamānyaṁgānu yistimi gāna mī
putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrārkastāyi
gānu yī reṁḍu mānyālu
Anubhaviṁstuṁnu Rest
Digital edition of SII 16.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
